title: CarPlan BTH500 Paint Thinner & Brush Cleaner 500ml
description: Car Plan Paint Thinner cleans brushes but also can be used for diluting paint. ADVANTAGES Cleans brushes Dilutes paints APPLICATION Brush out excess paint. Pour Car Plan Paint Thinner into a glass or metal container (do not use plastic containers). Rinse brush thoroughly in the thinner. Remove as much paint as possible before washing brush in soapy water. AVAILABILITY500ml - BTH500250ml - BTH250
